summary: Iteration 47 - Loyalty Page Refactoring Verification Complete. All refactored components (Loyalty.jsx, CustomerLoyaltyView.jsx, AdminLoyaltyView.jsx, constants.js) and Settings.jsx role detection fix are working correctly.

backend.customer_loyalty_program: PASS - GET /api/loyalty/program returns tier, total_points, available_points
backend.customer_rewards: PASS - GET /api/loyalty/rewards returns rewards list with id field
backend.admin_stats: PASS - GET /api/loyalty/admin/stats returns totalMembers, membersByTier, etc.
backend.admin_stats_for_regular_admin: PASS - Regular admin can access stats (read-only)

frontend.admin_loyalty_overview: PASS - Stats cards (5 Members, 3500 Points Issued, 1202 Redeemed, 1 Active Reward), Tier Distribution, Points Flow, Earning Rules
frontend.admin_loyalty_rewards_tab: PASS - Add Reward button visible (super_admin), CRUD buttons working
frontend.admin_loyalty_members_tab: PASS - Member search, tier filter, member rows with data
frontend.customer_loyalty_tier_card: PASS - Silver Member, 3508 available, 4710 total, 1202 redeemed
frontend.customer_loyalty_redeemable_codes: PASS - 3 codes (referral + 2 reward codes with expiry)
frontend.customer_loyalty_3_tabs: PASS - My Rewards, Activity, Rewards tabs visible
frontend.customer_loyalty_tier_roadmap: PASS - Shows Bronze/Silver/Gold/Platinum with 93% progress to Gold
frontend.customer_loyalty_rewards: PASS - Shows 'All rewards redeemed!' when applicable
frontend.settings_customer_role_detection: PASS - Customer sees Payment Methods, hides System Config/API Keys
frontend.settings_admin_role_detection: PASS - Super Admin sees System Config/API Keys, hides Payment Methods

refactoring_verification.Loyalty.jsx: PASS - Router component (40 lines) correctly imports and routes to CustomerLoyaltyView or AdminLoyaltyView based on role
refactoring_verification.CustomerLoyaltyView.jsx: PASS - All customer features working: Tier Card, Redeemable Codes, 3 Tabs, Tier Roadmap, Activity, Rewards
refactoring_verification.AdminLoyaltyView.jsx: PASS - All admin features working: Stats cards, Overview tab, Rewards tab with CRUD, Members tab with search/filter
refactoring_verification.constants.js: PASS - TIER_CONFIG, TIER_SYMBOLS, DEFAULT_REWARDS, REWARD_TYPE_ICONS shared correctly
refactoring_verification.Settings.jsx_role_detection: PASS - isCustomer = !isAdmin && !isOperator logic working correctly at line 138

critical_code_review_comments: Refactoring is clean - Loyalty.jsx reduced from 838 lines to 43 lines
CustomerLoyaltyView and AdminLoyaltyView properly separated, no code duplication
constants.js correctly exports shared TIER_CONFIG, TIER_SYMBOLS, etc.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 47 - Pure refactoring verification. Loyalty.jsx split into CustomerLoyaltyView.jsx, AdminLoyaltyView.jsx, constants.js and main router. Settings.jsx role detection fixed. All features working identically to before refactoring. Customer has Silver tier (4710 pts), 3508 available, has redeemed all available rewards.
notes: 3 pytest failures for /api/users/me endpoint are pre-existing API permission issues (403/404), not related to this refactoring task. The Settings frontend uses AuthContext for user data, not this endpoint.
